title: Set on Wet Board
description: Fold-error when draw completes — keep value but protect against straight/flush
coreRule: Set на wet board = fast-play. Не slowplay sets когда draws live. На completed draws = assess, sometimes fold.

decisions.description: You flopped set of 7s. Flop T-7-2 (2 spades), BB c/r, you called. Turn 5s = flush completes. BB leads pot. Hero set of 7s?

explanation.call: ✓ Still have redraw to boat (10 outs). Call for implied odds.
explanation.fold: Defensive OK vs aggressive OOP lead. Set becomes bluff catcher.
explanation.raise: Bad — fold out worse, called by flushes only.
explanation.default: Set vs completed flush = call w/ redraw, evaluate river.

decisions.description: Hero CO opened, BB called. Flop 9-T-J all hearts + straight possible. Hero set of 9s. BB checks. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ FAST-PLAY. Board crazy wet, set vulnerable. Big bet for value + protection.
explanation.default: Wet board + set = pot build. Slowplay = лишаешь value.

decisions.description: BTN opened, BB called. Flop 5-6-7 (OESD possible). Hero set of 5s. Action?

explanation.check: ✓ Check-raise line preferred OOP — maximize fold equity.
explanation.default: Set на straight-heavy = always raise eventually. Начни с check-raise.

decisions.description: You flopped set 4s. Board 4-6-9-J-Q all hearts by river. BB overbets all-in. Hero set (no heart). Action?

explanation.fold: ✓ 5-flush board, OB shove — fold. Every heart is a winner for them.
explanation.call: Crying call territory vs maniac — но GTO fold.
explanation.default: Set на monotone с overbet по river = fold. Не лечи curiosity.

decisions.description: Flop K-5-2, cbet called. Turn 8 = set. BB checks. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ Turned set on mostly dry board = value bet 60-75%. Kx will call, air picks up.
explanation.check: Rare trap — BB rarely bets into hero.
explanation.default: Turned set IP on dry = bet large for stacks by river.

decisions.description: CO opened 2.5x, Hero BB called. Flop 6-9-T (straight + FD live). Hero set. CO cbets 70% pot (5bb). Action?

explanation.raise: ✓ Check-raise на wet board. Set vulnerable — get stacks in or fold weak.
explanation.default: Set на wet с bet facing = x/r big. Никогда slowplay.
